bg.description: Page background — Primary background for all pages and sections

fg.description: Primary foreground — Main text, headings, icons

fg-muted.description: Muted foreground — Secondary text, descriptions, subtitles

fg-dim.description: Dim foreground — Tertiary text, decorative labels, counters

border.description: Border color — Card borders, dividers, separators

bg-sub.description: Subtle background — Alternating rows, shaded cells, hover states

accent.description: Accent / interactive — Buttons, active states, focus rings

accent-glow.description: Accent glow — Soft shadows, magnetic button aura

bg-elevated.description: Elevated surface — Cards, modals, popovers above background

accent-hover.description: Accent hover — Interactive elements on hover

accent-active.description: Accent active — Interactive elements on press
